| Feature | Syntax | Example |
|---------|--------|---------|
| Bold in cell | `**text**` | **works** |
| Code with pipe | `a | b` | keep together |
| HTML in cell | `<span>` | <em>italic</em> |
| Link in cell | `[](url)` | [click](https://example.com) |
| Escaped pipe | `\|` | <p>not \| a delimiter</p> |

| Left | Center | Right |
|:-----|:------:|------:|
| L1 | C1 | R1 |
| L2 | C2 | R2 |
